title: Platform Select
description: Apply different styles based on the device platform (iOS vs Android) using Platform.select().
problemStatement:
Platform specific! Style a `Text` component to have a `color` of `"blue"` on `ios` and `"green"` on `android` using the `Platform` module.

**Requirement:** Use the `Platform.select({ ... })` utility.
hints: React Native allows you to write one codebase for two platforms while still respecting their unique design languages.
expectedOutput: Blue text on iPhone, green text on Android emulator
